basic_details.job_title: NKGSB Bank Clerk Recruitment 2026 for 30 Vacancies in Mumbai, Thane, Navi Mumbai & Gujarat, Apply by June 11
basic_details.short_information: NKGSB Bank Clerk Recruitment 2026: NKGSB Co-operative Bank Ltd., a leading multi-state scheduled cooperative bank with over 108 years of legacy, has released an official notification inviting applications for 30 vacancies for the post of Clerk (Branch Operations). The vacancies are spread across branches in Mumbai, Thane, Navi Mumbai, and Gujarat.

important_dates.written test date: To be notified (via registered email after scrutiny)
important_dates.fee_payment_last_date: Sent via email to shortlisted candidates
important_dates.interview_date: To be notified after written test results

application_fee.details: The exam fee of ₹944/- is not paid at the time of application. After NKGSB Bank scrutinises your application and finds you eligible, instructions for the written test and fee deposit will be sent to your registered email ID. The fee is non-refundable once paid, so do not pay to any third-party or unofficial sources.

qualification.details: Before sending your application, verify that you meet all conditions below. Mismatch in information provided versus original documents at scrutiny stage will lead to disqualification, and the exam fee will not be refunded. | Minimum Second Class Graduate from a recognised university Freshers are eligible - no prior experience required Preference will be given to candidates with basic banking knowledge Proficiency in Computer Applications is required | The notification does not specify age relaxation for reserved categories. Candidates from SC/ST/OBC/PwD categories should confirm with the bank directly at [email protected] before applying. | The candidate must be a resident of Mumbai, Thane, Navi Mumbai, or Gujarat at the time of application. This is a hard eligibility condition - non-resident candidates from other cities are not eligible for this recruitment.

salary_details.details: The notification does not specify the exact salary or pay scale for the Clerk (Branch Operations) post. Based on NKGSB Bank's wage revision settlements and industry norms for multi-state scheduled cooperative banks, Clerk-level roles typically carry: | Basic Pay: Approximately ₹19,000 – ₹24,000 per month at entry level (under the IBA wage settlement structure applicable to cooperative banks, or bank's internal pay scale) Allowances: DA, HRA, CCA, and other allowances as per bank's service regulations Other Benefits: Provident Fund, Gratuity, Medical reimbursement as per bank rules | For confirmed salary details, candidates should contact the bank at [email protected] or check the latest NKGSB Bank service regulations.

selection_process: Conducted by an external agency (not directly by the bank) Test format
and exam date will be communicated to shortlisted candidates via their registered email ID after application scrutiny Based on past NKGSB and similar co-op bank patterns
the written test typically covers: Reasoning Ability
Final selection is made through a personal interview of candidates who qualify the written test Interview will be conducted at the bank's designated location (likely Mumbai)
There is no mention of a group discussion or document verification stage in this notification. However
original proof verification happens at the time of interview/joining - candidates must ensure all information provided in the application matches their original documents exactly.
how_to_apply: This recruitment uses an email-based application process - there is no online portal or form link. Follow these steps carefully:

Collect the following details in a plain format (not just resume - the bank wants this data separately): Full Name Residential Address Qualification Percentage Scored Date of Birth Email ID Mobile Number
Compose an email with both your resume and the above data pasted in the email body or as an attachment.
In the email subject line, clearly mention: 'Post applied for: CLERK'

Important: Use the same email ID you enter in the application data - all further communications, including written test instructions and exam fee payment details, will be sent only to this registered email ID.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NKGSB Bank Clerk 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to send your application email to [email protected] is June 11, 2026. There is no online application portal - you must email your resume and data in the specified format before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NKGSB Bank Clerk 2026?
faq.answer: NKGSB Co-operative Bank Ltd. has announced 30 vacancies for the post of Clerk (Branch Operations) across branches in Mumbai, Thane, Navi Mumbai, and Gujarat.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for NKGSB Bank Clerk 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a minimum second class graduate from a recognised university. Freshers are eligible - no prior experience is required, though preference is given to those with basic banking knowledge. Computer proficiency is mandatory. The candidate must be a resident of Mumbai, Thane, Navi Mumbai, or Gujarat.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for NKGSB Bank Clerk 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit, calculated as on April 30, 2026, is maximum 27 years for graduates and maximum 28 years for post graduates. Age relaxation details for reserved categories have not been specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. How do I apply for NKGSB Bank Clerk 2026?
faq.answer: Send an email to [email protected] with your updated resume and the following data: Name, Residential Address, Qualification, Percentage Scored, Date of Birth, Email ID, and Mobile Number. The subject line of your email must clearly state: 'Post applied for: CLERK'. Applications must be sent before June 11, 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the exam fee for NKGSB Bank Clerk 2026?
faq.answer: The written test examination fee is ₹944/-. This fee is NOT paid at the time of application. After the bank scrutinises applications and shortlists candidates, instructions for fee payment will be sent via email to the registered email ID. The fee is non-refundable.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NKGSB Bank Clerk?
faq.answer: Selection involves two stages. First, a written test conducted by an external agency - details are sent to shortlisted candidates by email. Second, a personal interview for candidates who qualify the written test. Final selection is based on interview performance.

faq.question: Q8. What is the syllabus for NKGSB Bank Clerk written test?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify the syllabus. Based on the pattern of similar cooperative bank clerk exams, the written test is expected to cover Reasoning Ability, Quantitative Aptitude, English Language, General Awareness (with Banking focus), and Computer Knowledge. The exact syllabus and format will be communicated to shortlisted candidates via email.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary for NKGSB Bank Clerk?
faq.answer: The salary is not specified in the current notification. Based on industry norms for multi-state scheduled cooperative banks, the approximate starting basic pay is in the range of ₹19,000–₹24,000 per month, with additional allowances (DA, HRA, CCA) and benefits (PF, Gratuity, Medical) as per bank rules. Candidates can confirm the exact figure by writing to [email protected].

faq.question: Q10. Is NKGSB Bank a government bank?
faq.answer: No, NKGSB Bank is not a government bank. It is a multi-state scheduled cooperative bank - one of the few cooperative banks in India to hold Scheduled Bank status under the Reserve Bank of India Act. It operates under RBI regulation like commercial banks but is structured as a cooperative society, not a public sector undertaking.
